title: theBalancedBriefNLtech
description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from theBalancedBriefNLtech, skipping any feeds with errors.

items.title: Anthropic’s India expansion collides with a local company that already had the name
items.description: India's Anthropic Software has taken the U.S. AI giant to court over a name dispute.

items.title: Best Ebike Locks (2026): Kryptonite, Litelok, Abus, Hiplok
items.description: These are our favorite ebike locks for every ride, including the best bike locks designed to thwart angle grinders.

items.title: Soundcore Aerofit 2 Pro Review: Open Earbuds With ANC?
items.description: The design of Soundcore’s latest open earbuds magically transforms them into noise-canceling buds. But does it actually work?

items.title: MrBeast’s company buys Gen Z-focused fintech app Step
items.description: YouTube megastar MrBeast announced on Monday that his company, Beast Industries, is buying Step, a teen-focused banking app.

items.title: ChatGPT rolls out ads

items.title: Databricks CEO says SaaS isn’t dead, but AI will soon make it irrelevant
items.description: AI isn't going to replace major SaaS apps with vibe-coded versions, Databricks Ali Ghodsi believes. But it could give rise to competitors.

items.title: Ferrari’s New Jony Ive–Designed EV Is Swathed in Glass and Aluminum

items.title: No Company Has Admitted to Replacing Workers With AI in New York
items.description: New York state has required companies to disclose if “technological innovation or automation” was the cause of job loss for nearly a year. So far, non...

items.title: Save $100 On Our Favorite Home Printer
items.description: The Epson ET-2980 is a great value at its full price, and the discount sweetens the deal.

items.title: Bluesky finally adds Drafts
items.description: The move comes as Bluesky’s competitors, X and Threads, have long supported drafts.
